name: warmingtea-monorepo
description: Warmingtea.su - Full-stack project with Next.js + NestJS

scripts.lint:check: pnpm --filter web lint && pnpm --filter api lint:check
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter web exec tsc --noEmit && pnpm --filter api exec tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json
scripts.test: pnpm --filter web test && pnpm --filter api exec jest --passWithNoTests
